name: Steer Vehicle
desc: Player steers a vehicle (boat or horse). Sends sideways/forward movement and flags.

fields.name: forward
fields.desc: Forward movement strength (-1 to 1). Positive = forward.

implementation.overview: Sent when steering a vehicle (boat/horse). Carries sideways (float), forward (float), jump flag, unmount flag. Modules: BoatFly (spoof values for speed), HorseJump (max jump boost).

modules.name: BoatFly
modules.purpose: Spoof input values for vehicle speed.
